title: Dunlop Nitro Glow 6 Table Tennis Balls multicoloured, Recreational Player Training Balls

description: From the manufacturer Dunlop: Love the Game We are driven by an overwhelming passion for the game - we want to play it, improve it, share it. The match belongs to everyone. No matter where, how well or how often you play. For over 130 years, it has been the love of the game that has driven us. DUNLOP Table Tennis Balls These high-quality table tennis balls are the ideal choice for players of all levels. With optimum bounce characteristics and even rotation, they ensure an unrivalled playing experience. Beginners, recreational players and professionals alike benefit from the precise workmanship and official tournament dimensions. Whether for indoor or outdoor play, these balls have an authentic feel and maximum versatility. Excellent playability: table tennis balls with optimum bounce characteristics and even rotation. Versatile: Perfect for training, tournaments and leisure games - both indoors and outdoors. Standard size and weight: Complies with official tournament requirements for a professional feel. High precision: Ensures consistent performance with every stroke. Suitable for all players: Ideal for beginners, recreational players and professionals.
